query: Identify and detect the two large circular storage tanks, measure their diameters using the GSD, assuming 0.6m/px
final_answer: The diameters of the two storage tanks are approximately 84.0 meters and 85.2 meters respectively.

evaluation.question: Is the measured diameter of the first storage tank within 75.6 and 92.4 meters?
Is the measured diameter of the second storage tank within 76.68 and 93.72 meters?
